title: Police searching for missing 15-year-old Boston girl
author: Heather Alterisio
bullets: Local News The teenager was last seen on the morning of Tuesday, May 19.
Boston police are seeking the public’s help in locating a 15-year-old girl, who has not been seen for three weeks.
Briyana Jacques, a resident of the city’s Dorchester neighborhood, was last spotted leaving her Rosedale Street home for school on the morning of Tuesday, May 19.
